questionHtml: Outline the role of bioinformatics in the genetic modification of plants.
markschemeHtml:
a. bioinformatics allows rapid analysis of large numbers of (genetic) samples 

b. target genes can be identified/recognized rapidly 

c. target gene linked to sequences that control its regulation are also identified 

d. target gene introduced into host

meta.title: Outline the role of bioinformatics in the genetic modification of plants.
breadcrumbLabels: Option B: Biotechnology and bioinformatics (Core topics)
